nasb.text: Let it be to him as a garment with which he covers himself, And for a belt with which he constantly girds himself.

esv.text: May it be like a garment that he wraps around him, like a belt that he puts on every day!

cnv.text: 願這咒詛像衣服一般給他披上， 並當作他常常束上的腰帶。

ccb.text: 愿咒诅不离其身， 如同身上的衣服和腰间的带子。

csbs.text: 愿诅咒如同他披戴在身上的衣服， 又如他常常束上的腰带。
